The firm seeks maximum profit by optimizing production levels without tax evasion entertainment.
*Division A profit function* shows a net loss per unit due to high expenses entertainment.
*Division B profit function* also indicates a net loss for every unit produced entertainment.
*Total profit calculation* reveals that zero production yields the highest possible value entertainment.
*Transfer price constraint* requires alpha and beta to equal zero to satisfy the inequality entertainment.
*Final tax liability* becomes zero when no units are transferred or sold entertainment.
The optimal values for x and y are both zero to maximize the value entertainment.
